log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Bandit: WIS save [d20:10+0=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Bandit: WIS save [d20:19+0=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Bandit: WIS save [d20:13+0=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Bandit: WIS save [d20:12+0=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 4/7 targets affected.
Bandit is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Mage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 15 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Bandit's turn ---
Bandit can't reach Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Scimitar (distance 20ft, range 5ft).
Bandit is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Bandit Captain's turn ---
Bandit Captain can't reach Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Scimitar (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 30ft, range 5ft).
Bandit is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===

Ogre attacks Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician HP: 13/67
--- Bandit's turn ---

--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 35ft, range 5ft).
=== ROUND 3 ===

→ Yuan-Ti — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 14 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
